reviews.name: Professor Jayanath Colombage
reviews.title: Ambassador of Sri Lanka to Indonesia
reviews.text: I came to Vietnam for a personal tour with my wife. Everything was organized by AEON Travels and Tours. We have been having a great time in Hanoi and we have explored all the key monuments in Hanoi city and the old quarter and we have seen a large number of temples and also some cave temples, very beautiful out of this world. And then we went to Trang An and then we went on a boat tour through the crust formation and thank you very much, AEON. And our travel advisor is Chathurika. So Chathurika and your team, thank you very much. We are having a great time. Everything is great. And right now we are on Sena Cruise. It is a beautiful boutique cruise ship. And everything is great.

reviews.name: Sarah and James Thompson
reviews.text: Absolutely incredible trip! The Nine Arch Bridge was even more breathtaking than the photos. Our guide was knowledgeable, friendly and went above and beyond. The train journey through the tea plantations was the highlight of our entire vacation. AEON handled everything seamlessly from airport pickup to hotel check-ins. We could not have asked for a better experience and will absolutely be booking with them again.

reviews.name: Rajesh Patel
reviews.text: Outstanding service from start to finish. The team arranged everything perfectly. Sri Lanka is a gem of a destination and this tour package covered all the must-see places beautifully. Our driver guide was exceptional, full of knowledge and always smiling. Sigiriya was absolutely mind-blowing and the beach days in Galle were the perfect way to end the trip. 10/10 would recommend to everyone.

reviews.name: Emily Chen
reviews.text: An amazing 12-day adventure through Sri Lanka. Every single detail was perfectly planned. From the moment we landed there was always someone there to help. Sigiriya was absolutely breathtaking and the beach days in Galle were the perfect way to end the trip. The food recommendations from our guide were also incredible. We had the best seafood of our lives!

reviews.name: Michael and Anna Schneider
reviews.text: Our honeymoon in the Maldives was absolutely perfect. AEON took care of every little detail. The overwater bungalow was stunning, the sunsets were out of this world and the snorkelling was incredible. We saw so many colourful fish and even a sea turtle! The private beach dinners arranged by our expert were so romantic. This was truly the trip of a lifetime.

reviews.name: David Okonkwo
reviews.text: Dubai was absolutely incredible and AEON made it even better. The desert safari was one of the most thrilling experiences of my life. The Burj Khalifa visit at sunset was unforgettable. Our guide knew all the best spots and restaurants. The accommodation at Atlantis was world class. Would 100% book with AEON again for my next trip.

reviews.name: Yuki Tanaka
reviews.tourTitle: 11 Days Vietnam North to South Discovery
reviews.text: Vietnam is a country that stole my heart and AEON made sure I experienced it in the best possible way. The 11-day itinerary was perfectly paced. Ha Long Bay was absolutely magical. Hoi An at night with all the lanterns was like a fairy tale. The food tour in Ho Chi Minh City was my personal highlight. Exceptional service throughout the entire trip.

reviews.name: Priya and Suresh Nair
reviews.text: We celebrated our 10th anniversary in Sri Lanka with AEON and it exceeded all our expectations. The luxury accommodation was incredible, the private guides were knowledgeable and the itinerary was thoughtfully crafted. Nuwara Eliya was breathtaking. The farewell dinner arranged by our expert was so touching. Highly recommend for anniversaries and honeymoons.

reviews.name: Robert and Linda Martinez
reviews.text: The Angkor Wat sunrise was the most spectacular thing we have ever witnessed. AEON organised every detail of our Cambodia trip flawlessly. Our guide was an expert in Khmer history and brought the temples to life with his stories. The Raffles Hotel in Phnom Penh was gorgeous. Cambodia is underrated as a destination and AEON helped us discover it properly.

reviews.name: Fatima Al-Hassan
reviews.text: Bali was a dream destination for me and AEON made every single moment magical. The rice terraces in Ubud, the sacred temples, the beautiful beaches in Seminyak — everything was perfectly arranged. Our private villa was stunning with an infinity pool overlooking the jungle. The traditional Kecak fire dance performance was spectacular. I will definitely be returning to Bali with AEON.

reviews.name: Chris and Megan Park
reviews.tourTitle: 7 Days Singapore and KL City Highlights
reviews.text: Singapore and KL in one trip was the perfect combination. Gardens by the Bay at night blew our minds. The Supertree light show was absolutely unforgettable. Petronas Towers in KL was equally stunning. The food scene in both cities was incredible and our guide always knew the best hawker stalls. AEON's organisation was flawless from start to finish.

reviews.name: Ananya Krishnaswamy
reviews.tourTitle: 4 Days Mirissa and Unawatuna Beach Getaway
reviews.text: A wonderful beach getaway! The whale watching in Mirissa was absolutely breathtaking. We saw a blue whale! Unawatuna beach was gorgeous with crystal clear water perfect for snorkelling. The guesthouse recommended by AEON was right on the beach and had the most stunning views. Great value for money and excellent personal service. Already planning my return trip!
